title: drymaria divaricata var. viscidula
intro: Drymaria divaricata var. viscidula, commonly known as sticky chickweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Caryophyllaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions, wounds, and digestive problems, due to its soothing and protective properties. Drymaria divaricata var. viscidula can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or topical application, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for promoting overall well-being.
